# WYNC NEWS — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> WYNC NEWS is a local news and weather media outlet based in Oneida, NY. The station features a dedicated weather team and leverages Doppler radar technology to deliver accurate forecasts and real-time severe weather alerts to its community audience. The brand centers around trust, urgency, and local relevance — keeping Oneida residents informed and safe.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Get real-time local news coverage and severe weather alerts for Oneida, NY. Trust WYNC NEWS to keep your family informed and safe with urgent updates that matter most.

### Weather
https://example.com/weather
Plan your day with confidence using WYNC NEWS weather forecasts for Oneida. Our dedicated team delivers accurate, hyper-local predictions so you&#39;re never caught off guard.

### Doppler Radar
https://example.com/doppler-radar
Watch storms approach Oneida in real time with our advanced Doppler radar technology. See precipitation, rotation, and intensity before severe weather strikes your neighborhood.

### Severe Weather Alerts
https://example.com/severe-weather-alerts
Instant severe weather alerts for Oneida, NY when every second counts. WYNC NEWS delivers life-saving warnings for tornadoes, floods, and storms straight to your screen.

### News Team
https://example.com/news-team
Discover the dedicated journalists and meteorologists powering WYNC NEWS. Our Oneida-based team works around the clock to bring you accurate local news coverage and severe weather alerts.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Connect with WYNC NEWS in Oneida, NY. Send news tips, ask weather questions, or join our mission to deliver accurate severe weather alerts and local news coverage to our community.

## Legal & Policy

### Privacy Policy
https://example.com/privacy
Information about how user data is collected, stored, and protected.

### Terms & Conditions
https://example.com/terms
Legal terms describing service usage, rights, and policies.

### Accessibility Statement
https://example.com/accessibility
Information about WCAG compliance and accessibility features.

---

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/severe-weather-alerts
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox, required)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About WYNC NEWS
WYNC NEWS is a local news and weather media outlet based in Oneida, NY. The station features a dedicated weather team and leverages Doppler radar technology to deliver accurate forecasts and real-time severe weather alerts to its community audience. The brand centers around trust, urgency, and local relevance — keeping Oneida residents informed and safe.

## Target Audience
- residents of Oneida, NY and surrounding areas
- Local Residents
- Commuters and Travelers
- Emergency Preparedness Groups

## Industry
News & Media

---

- Sitemap (XML): https://example.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
- Flattened page text (for LLMs): https://example.com/llms-full.txt
